text.div:
NameFlagsCard.TypeDescription & Constraints
pcdch-molecularAnalysis 0..*PCDCH Molecular Analysis Model
classification 1..1codeprimary | metastatic | unknown | not-reported (EWS, INRG)
Binding: PCDCH Molecular Analysis Classification ValueSet (extensible)
sampleSource 1..1codeblood | marrow |unknown | not-reported (ALL)
Binding: PCDCH Molecular Analysis Classification ValueSet (extensible)
cytogeneticAnalysis 0..1BackboneElementA cytogenetic molecular analysis
method 1..1codekaryotyping | FISH | CMA | CGH | aCGH (AML, EWS, ALL, GCT)
Binding: PCDCH Cytogenetic Analysis Method ValueSet (extensible)
karyotypeStatus 0..1codenormal | abnormal | unknown | not-reported (ALL, GCT)
Binding: PCDCH Karyotype Status ValueSet (extensible)
dnaIndex 0..1codehypodiploid | diploid | hyperdiploid | unknown | not-reported (INRG)
Binding: PCDCH DNA Index ValueSet (extensible)
dnaIndexNumeric 0..1integerNumeric DNA Index (ALL)
cytodifferentiation 0..1code1 | 2 | 3 | unknown | not-reported (NRSTS)
Binding: PCDCH Cytodifferentiation ValueSet (required)
chromosomeTotal 0..1integerNumber of chromosomes on karyotype (ALL, GCT)
abberationTotal 0..1integerNumber of independent abberations on karyotype (AML, GCT)
metaphaseTotal 0..1integerNumber of cells in metaphase during karyotyping (AML)
mitosesScore 0..1code1 | 2 | 3 | unknown | not-reported (NRSTS)
Binding: PCDCH Mitoses Scores ValueSet (required)
abnormalityResult 1..*BackboneElementMolecular Abnormality Result
status 1..1codepositive | negative | not-done | unknown | not-reported (AML, ALL, RMS)
Binding: PCDCH Molecular Abnormality Result Status ValueSet (extensible)
mutationType 0..1codesomatic | germline/constitutional | unknown | not-reported (INRG)
Binding: PCDCH Mutation Type ValueSet (required)
cytogeneticVariantType 0..1codetranslocation | inversion | mutation | SNV | CNV | rearrangement | deletion | amplification | other | unknown | not-reported (AML, EWS, RMS, NRSTS, INRG, GCT, ALL)
Binding: PCDCH Cytogenetic Variant Type ValueSet (required)
iscn 0..1stringValid ISCN string (AML, ALL, GCT)
translocationStatus 0..1codebalanced | unbalanced| unknown | not-reported (ALL)
Binding: PCDCH Translocation Status ValueSet (required)
geneFusion 0..1BackboneElementTypically expressed as either: Gene1/Gene2, Gene1-Gene2, or Gene1::Gene2
gene1 1..1codeValid HGNC gene symbol (AML, EWS, RMS, NRSTS, INRG, GCT, ALL)
Binding: http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/genomics-reporting/ValueSet/hgnc (required)
gene2 1..1codeValid HGNC gene symbol (AML, EWS, RMS, NRSTS, INRG, GCT, ALL)
Binding: http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/genomics-reporting/ValueSet/hgnc (required)
repository 0..1BackboneElementExternal repository which contains detailed report (AML, ALL)
type 1..1codedirectlink | openapi | login | oauth | other
Binding: repositoryType (required)
url 0..1uriURI of the repository
name 0..1stringRepository's name
dataset 0..1stringId of the dataset that used to call for dataset in repository
variantsetId 0..1stringId of the variantset that used to call for variantset in repository
readsetId 0..1stringId of the read
genotypingAnalysis 0..1BackboneElementA genotyping molecular analysis
method 1..1codeNGS | DNA microarray | CE | GE | PCR | RT-PCR (AML, EWS, ALL, GCT)
Binding: PCDCH Genotyping Analysis Method ValueSet (extensible)
abnormalityResult 1..*BackboneElementMolecular Abnormality Result
status 1..1codepositive | negative | not-done | unknown | not-reported (AML, ALL, RMS)
Binding: PCDCH Molecular Abnormality Result Status ValueSet (extensible)
mutationType 0..1codesomatic | germline/constitutional | unknown | not-reported (INRG)
Binding: PCDCH Mutation Type ValueSet (required)
genotypingVariantType 0..1codesubstitution | deletion | duplication | insertion | inversion | frameshift | extension | other | unknown | not-reported (AML, EWS, RMS, NRSTS, INRG, GCT, ALL)
Binding: PCDCH Genotyping Variant Type ValueSet (required)
hgvs 0..1stringValid HGVS string (AML, INRG, ALL)
allelicRatio 0..1integerThe percentage of reads that show SNV at a particular nucleotide position (AML, INRG)
geneFusion 0..1BackboneElementTypically expressed as either: Gene1/Gene2, Gene1-Gene2, or Gene1::Gene2
gene1 1..1codeValid HGNC gene symbol (AML, EWS, RMS, NRSTS, INRG, GCT, ALL)
Binding: http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/genomics-reporting/ValueSet/hgnc (required)
gene2 1..1codeValid HGNC gene symbol (AML, EWS, RMS, NRSTS, INRG, GCT, ALL)
Binding: http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/genomics-reporting/ValueSet/hgnc (required)
repository 0..1BackboneElementExternal repository which contains detailed report (AML, ALL)
type 1..1codedirectlink | openapi | login | oauth | other
Binding: repositoryType (required)
url 0..1uriURI of the repository
name 0..1stringRepository's name
dataset 0..1stringId of the dataset that used to call for dataset in repository
variantsetId 0..1stringId of the variantset that used to call for variantset in repository
readsetId 0..1stringId of the read

Documentation for this format
